commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the bundled Codex app-server runtime to stabilize dynamic-tool fingerprints, preserve existing bindings across transient no-tool starts, project mirrored history when starting without a reusable native binding, add regression tests, and add a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows order-sensitive dynamic-tool fingerprints can clear the binding, and mirrored history is only projected when the context engine is active; the PR adds targeted tests for those paths.
